name: Cohere API
what_it_does: Enterprise LLM platform providing text generation (Command-R), embeddings (Embed), and reranking APIs optimized for retrieval-augmented generation workflows.
use_cases: Embed documents into vector space for semantic search in agent memory systems
Rerank retrieved documents by relevance before passing to an LLM for final answer generation
Generate grounded responses with Command-R's native RAG capabilities and citation support
Classify or cluster text at scale using Cohere Embed v3 multilingual models
Build enterprise chat agents with Command-R-Plus for long-context multi-turn conversations
not_for: Image or audio generation tasks (text-only platform)
Real-time applications requiring sub-100ms latency at scale
Projects needing fully open-weight models for on-premises deployment without licensing
best_when: Building RAG pipelines where semantic retrieval quality and reranking accuracy are the primary performance levers.
avoid_when: Your agent needs multimodal inputs or you require an OpenAI-compatible drop-in with no migration effort.

auth.notes: Single API key passed as Bearer token in Authorization header; separate keys available per environment (trial vs production).

pricing.free_tier_limits: $1M in free API credits for new accounts; rate-limited trial keys available immediately without credit card
pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-per-token: Command-R ~$0.15/1M input tokens; Command-R-Plus ~$2.50/1M input tokens; Embed ~$0.10/1M tokens; enterprise contracts available
pricing.notes: Trial API key available immediately; production key requires account verification; $1M free credits program for qualifying startups.

performance.rate_limits: Trial: 10 req/min, 1000 req/month; Production: 10,000 req/min default with higher limits on request

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: HTTP status codes are consistent; error bodies include a message field and occasionally a param field identifying the offending input; 429 responses include retry-after headers.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Generation endpoints are non-deterministic; no idempotency keys offered; embed endpoints are deterministic for identical inputs.
known_agent_gotchas: Command-R grounded generation requires passing documents as a separate field — not in the prompt — to activate citation mode; mixing both causes degraded quality
Embed v3 requires specifying input_type (search_document vs search_query) — using the wrong type silently reduces retrieval accuracy by 10-20%
Rerank endpoint has a max of 1000 documents per request; exceeding this returns a 400 rather than silently truncating
Trial API keys share rate limits across all trial users, causing unpredictable 429s during peak hours
Streaming responses for generate use server-sent events but the SDK's stream iterator does not expose finish_reason until iteration is complete

security_score_components.security_notes: API keys have no built-in expiry or scope restrictions; key rotation requires manual revocation; no sub-key or project-level isolation.
